sourcePage.rawText:
18   What is the smallest positive value of a for which the line x = a is a line of
     symmetry of the graph of y = sin (2x − 4π3
                                                )?

         π
     A   12

         5π
     B   12

         7π
     C   12

         11π
     D    12

         19π
     E    12




                                             20

stem.rawText:
What is the smallest positive value of a for which the line x = a is a line of
     symmetry of the graph of y = sin (2x − 4π3
                                                )?

         π

solution.rawText:
The lines of symmetry of a sine or cosine graph (that is, something of the form sin(kx + θ) + c
or cos(kx + θ) + c) are at the x-values where the sine or cosine equals ±1. So in this case, if we
solve sin(2x − 4π
                3 ) = ±1 we will find the lines of symmetry.
We solve each of them separately.
We have sin θ = 1 when θ = π2 + 2nπ (for any integer n), so in this case, this gives

                                           2x − 4π   π
                                                 3 = 2 + 2nπ
                                 ⇐⇒             2x = 11π
                                                      6 + 2nπ
                                 ⇐⇒               x = 11π
                                                       12 + nπ

So the smallest positive value of x with sin(2x − 4π              11π
                                                   3 ) = 1 is x = 12
In the second case, we have sin θ = −1 when θ = − π2 + 2nπ (for any integer n), so in this case,
this gives

                                           2x − 4π     π
                                                 3 = − 2 + 2nπ
                                 ⇐⇒             2x = 5π
                                                      6 + 2nπ
                                 ⇐⇒               x = 5π
                                                      12 + nπ

So the smallest positive value of x with sin(2x − 4π               5π
                                                   3 ) = −1 is x = 12
This is smaller than 11π                  5π
                      12 so the answer is 12 , which is option B.
